help: Allows role to view, filter by role, and sort all members and edit data about them.
name: group-members-manage

help: Allows role to edit group details (name, description, joinState, etc).
name: group-data-manage

help: Allows role to view the full group audit log.
name: group-audit-view

help: Allows role to create roles, modify roles, and delete roles.
name: group-roles-manage

help: Allows role to manage the permissions for the default role (aka Everyone role).
name: group-default-role-manage

help: Allows role to assign/unassign roles to users.
name: group-roles-assign

help: Allows role to ban/unban users and view all banned users.
name: group-bans-manage

help: Allows role to remove someone from the group.
name: group-members-remove

help: Allows role to view all members in a group, not just friends.
name: group-members-viewall

help: Allows role to set/clear group announcement and send it as a notification.
name: group-announcement-manage

help: Allows role to create, modify, and publish calendar entries.
name: group-calendar-manage

help: Allows role to create, reorder, edit, and delete group galleries. Can always submit to galleries, and can approve images.
name: group-galleries-manage

help: Allows role to create/cancel invites, as well as accept/decline/block join requests.
name: group-invites-manage

help: Allows role to moderate within a group instance.
name: group-instance-moderate

help: Allows role to rename or close a group instance.
name: group-instance-manage

help: Gives role priority for group instance queues.
name: group-instance-queue-priority

help: Allows role to create group instances that require users to have age verified and be 18 or above in order to join.
name: group-instance-age-gated-create

help: Allows role to create group instances linked live events, events starting within 6 hours, and events that have ended within 6 hours.
name: group-instance-calendar-link

help: Allows role to create group instances that are open to all, member or not. NOTE: Private groups cannot create public instances.
name: group-instance-public-create

help: Allows role to create group instances that friends of people present can also join.
name: group-instance-plus-create

help: Allows role to create members-only instances.
name: group-instance-open-create

help: Allows role to add/remove/modify role restrictions on members-only instances.
name: group-instance-restricted-create

help: Allows role to open locked portals to Group+ instances. Members, friends of people there, and friends of the portal dropper may enter unless group-banned.
name: group-instance-plus-portal

help: Allows role to open unlocked portals to Group+ instances. Everyone except group-banned people may enter.
name: group-instance-plus-portal-unlocked

help: Allows role to join group instances.
name: group-instance-join
